text: What if I told you bacteria can share survival secrets? Enter plasmids—small loops of DNA that can carry vital genes. These loops can hold genes for antibiotic resistance, making bacteria tougher. Studies show plasmids can transfer genes between different bacterial species. This gene sharing can lead to rapid evolution, posing challenges in medicine. Want to dive deeper into the world of genetics? Hit that follow button!
